When to use:

Configure and fix React frontend CI quality gates. Use when setting up or repairing npm lint, format check, TypeScript build, Vitest or Jest with coverage thresholds, Husky pre-commit hooks, or GitHub Actions failures on ESLint, Prettier, tsc, or test scripts.
